span.p:
Web Editor SPA
React + TypeScript + TipTap/Yjs + IndexedDB
Rich-text editing, local state, offline queue, AI UX

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
API Application
NestJS + TypeScript REST/SSE
Document CRUD, sharing, versions, authz, AI/job APIs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Collaboration Service
Node.js + Hocuspocus/Yjs over WebSocket
Live sync, presence, bootstrap, reconnect

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI Orchestrator Worker
Node.js + BullMQ
Prompt assembly, quotas, model routing, suggestion artifacts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PostgreSQL
Users, documents, permissions, versions,
AI metadata, audit events

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redis
Presence, room cache, pub/sub,
AI job queue

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Object Storage
Version snapshots, exports,
large AI suggestion payloads
